# AI Memory (Fallback)

Purpose: a tiny, append-only store for durable workflow learnings when no dedicated memory system (e.g., sticky notes, memory MCP) exists.

## Rules

- Append-only. Keep entries short and high-signal.
- No secrets, tokens, PII, or proprietary manuscript/customer content.
- Prefer operational facts: commands, paths, ports, gotchas.

## Entries

- (YYYY-MM-DD) topic: hint
